tasks.subject: Task 1: Quality gate in process-inbox (#40)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** process-inbox reads file body content and moves low-quality files to `$LIBRARY/recycling-bin/` instead of routing them to a stack's incoming dir.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md`
- Create: `templates/library/recycling-bin/.gitkeep`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Files with specific technical facts route to stack incoming/ as normal
- Files with only generic content move to recycling-bin/
- Step 6 report includes Recycled section when any files recycled
- `templates/library/recycling-bin/.gitkeep` exists

**Verify:** Manual smoke test — low-quality file goes to recycling-bin/, high-quality file routes to stack incoming/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md", "templates/library/recycling-bin/.gitkeep"], "verifyCommand": "manual smoke test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["low-quality files route to recycling-bin/", "high-quality files route to stack incoming/", "Step 6 report includes Recycled section", "recycling-bin/.gitkeep in library template"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Scheduled loop script (#14)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `scripts/loop.sh` does mechanical inbox routing (keyword scoring) then invokes `catalog-sources` via `claude -p` for each stack that received files. Enable/disable via `.loop-enabled` sentinel.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/loop.sh`
- Create: `tests/loop.bats`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Exits 0 when `.loop-enabled` absent (disabled)
- Exits 0 when inbox empty (logs no-op)
- Routes inbox files by keyword scoring against STACK.md scope (threshold ≥2)
- Invokes `claude -p "/stacks:catalog-sources {stack}"` per routed stack
- Skips claude when no files routed
- Logs all activity with ISO-8601 timestamps
- `bats tests/loop.bats` passes (all 7 tests)

**Verify:** `bats tests/loop.bats` → all 7 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/loop.sh", "tests/loop.bats"], "verifyCommand": "bats tests/loop.bats", "acceptanceCriteria": ["disabled when .loop-enabled absent", "no-op when inbox empty", "routes by keyword score", "invokes claude -p per stack", "all 7 bats tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: /stacks:guide on-demand synthesis (#18)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New `/stacks:guide "{topic}"` skill retrieves relevant articles across stacks and synthesizes a structured long-form guide to `$LIBRARY/guides/{slug}.md`. `/stacks:ask` surfaces existing guides before article retrieval.

**Files:**
- Create: `skills/guide/SKILL.md`
- Create: `templates/library/guides/.gitkeep`
- Modify: `skills/ask/SKILL.md` (add Step 1b guide check)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Guide written to `$LIBRARY/guides/{slug}.md` with frontmatter: topic, generated, stacks, articles (with SHAs), excluded
- `--stacks` flag scopes retrieval to named stacks
- `--regenerate` overwrites existing guide
- Guide body 800-2000 words with structured sections
- `/stacks:ask` checks guides/ before article retrieval (Step 1b)

**Verify:** Manual smoke test — `/stacks:guide "test topic"` writes guides/test-topic.md, `/stacks:ask "test topic"` surfaces it

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/guide/SKILL.md", "templates/library/guides/.gitkeep", "skills/ask/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual smoke test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guide written with correct frontmatter", "--stacks flag scopes retrieval", "--regenerate overwrites", "ask Step 1b surfaces existing guide"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Comparison page type (#7)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stacks produce `comparisons/{slug}.md` pages from source files with `## Comparison: X vs Y` sections. catalog-sources pre-filters these before W1 and dispatches comparison-synthesizer.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/stack/STACK.md` (add Comparison Template section)
- Create: `templates/stack/comparisons/.gitkeep`
- Create: `agents/comparison-synthesizer.md`
- Modify: `skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md` (add pre-filter before W1)
- Modify: `templates/stack/index.md` (add Comparisons section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- STACK.md template has Comparison Template section
- comparison-synthesizer writes comparisons/{slug}.md (not articles/)
- comparison-synthesizer reports COMPARISON_SKIPPED when <3 criteria
- catalog-sources pre-filters comparison sources before W1 dispatch
- W1-W2 pipeline only processes non-comparison sources
- index.md template has Comparisons section

**Verify:** Manual smoke test — source with `## Comparison: X vs Y` + /stacks:catalog-sources → comparisons/x-vs-y.md written

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/stack/STACK.md", "templates/stack/comparisons/.gitkeep", "agents/comparison-synthesizer.md", "skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md", "templates/stack/index.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual smoke test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["comparison-synthesizer writes to comparisons/", "COMPARISON_SKIPPED when <3 criteria", "catalog-sources pre-filters before W1", "index.md has Comparisons section"]}
```
